provenance.citation: Rocket Homes listing 607-611 Nelray (three contiguous lots); Travis Central Appraisal District parcel layer via place substrate.

reasoning: Third of the three contiguous listing lots. Per docs/property_ground_truth.md only parcel 226623 (situs 611) is operator-confirmed; this 609 lot is resolved through resolve_place + get_place_layers. The Travis CAD geographic ID is held as a stable local id and backfilled from the parcel-layer atomDid when the live Place API is reachable. The ground truth describes the existing improvements as two duplexes and one single-family home across the assemblage; 609 is modeled as the single-family lot.

confidence.stateNote: Lot identity and assemblage membership are substrate-resolved from the listing + place layer but not operator-confirmed; the geographic ID is pending live Place-API fetch. Baseline, provenance-backed, not earned-calibrated.
